changes_made: Fixed DAO method calls from getPostLikesWithProfiles to getPostLikersWithProfiles
Changed from domain models (PostLike, SavedPost) to DTOs (PostLikeWithProfile, SavedPostWithDetails)
Added type parameters to all LoadParams instances
Fixed SavedPostDao usage to handle Flow returns
Updated helper methods to create correct DTO types
Fixed WorkoutPostEntity constructor to match actual entity structure
Rewrote tests to match actual FeedRemoteMediator implementation

remaining_work.likely_issues: Missing imports, incorrect method signatures, wrong types
Use case signature changes, return type mismatches

lessons_learned: DAO methods often return Flow instead of direct values in Room
PagingSource DTOs are different from domain models
LiftrixResult is a type alias for Result<T>, not a sealed class
FeedRemoteMediator doesn't use API service directly, uses cache service
WorkoutPostEntity has different fields than expected (no tags, mentions, etc.)
LoadParams requires explicit type parameters in tests
recommended_next_steps: Fix remaining test files starting with smaller ones (TodoResolutionValidationTest, CalculateExerciseRankingTest)
Run full test suite after all compilation errors are fixed
Verify no regression introduced by the fixes
Consider creating shared test fixtures for commonly used mocks
